item.title: Version 0.1.13
item.description:
chore: point Sparkle feed + release URLs at the real GitHub user
The Sparkle agent baked the placeholder `semihsilistre.github.io` domain into project.yml / Info.plist / release.sh / docs / README. The real repo lives at https://github.com/unkownpr/multiversewp and GitHub Pages is enabled on gh-pages → https://unkownpr.github.io/ multiversewp. Swap every reference accordingly.
SUFeedURL inside Info.plist matters most: without this fix, Sparkle would hit a 404 every Check-for-Updates and report "feed unreachable".
